name: @holoscript/qm-bridge
description: Quantum mechanics bridge plugin for HoloScript. Wraps Psi4 (CCSD molecular), Quantum ESPRESSO (DFT solid-state), and TBLite (semi-empirical) under unified SimulationContract scale-tag dispatch.

scripts.test: pnpm -w exec vitest run --root packages/plugins/qm-bridge --config vitest.config.ts

author: brianonbased-dev
